manager.bio: The greatest rebuild story in the league. Went 3-11 in 2022 and finished dead last. Quietly accumulated assets through losing seasons, then exploded as a contender in 2024-25. Three straight playoff appearances. The league's dark horse entering every season.

trades.note: Sold Henry at peak value and tanked strategically. Accumulated a war chest of picks.
Moved up for Daniels before the NFL draft. Became the QB of the window.
Shipped the aging slot WR for a legitimate WR1. The move that put them over the top.
Bought Kyren's upside for one last push. Williams delivered in the playoff run.

rivalries.description: RBR's veteran savvy has given TDTD19844 fits. RBR leads the all-time series decisively.
Two teams on similar rebuild arcs — both peaked around 2024-25 as the league's rising contenders.
Perfectly even across the full dynasty. Every matchup has felt like a playoff game.
